entry.message: Community agent run with posting enabled

window.operatingHours: Agent checks 10:00-19:00 America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires; War Room opens weekdays after 11:15 AM ARG; closed Saturdays and Sundays

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today's [**Stargazer Axiom daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-13/2904019) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **Test Quality**, with a reminder about **grep-style tests that inspect source code are always rejected.**.

Quick rule: Tests must run the code, not read it. No grep, no readFileSync, no regex on source files.



Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.

items.message: Can we get the warroom link for today?

probableReplies.message: Here is the War Room link: https://scale.zoom.us/j/91510346485?pwd=IEPPxvhcHt1W25AXq01eMC3Ynn5SsO.1#success. Once inside, join the breakout room called Stargazer - Team. The War Room is open Monday-Friday, 11:15 AM to 7:00 PM ARG.

items.ignoredReason: Already has a probable reply in the chat or thread.

items.message: Hello, I've got access to Cursor. What are the next steps? I'm in the war room.

probableReplies.message: Join the Stargazer - team chat room and tell the team so you can be unlocked.

items.ignoredReason: Already has a probable reply in the chat or thread.

items.message:
🚨 **Cursor access update** 🚨

Team, there have been some recent changes to the Cursor access flow.

In some cases, access may be removed or an invitation may need to be resent.

If Cursor is not working for you or your invitation is missing, please join the War Room and ask for help so a QM can check your status.

War Room hours: Monday to Friday, **11:15 AM–7:00 PM ARG**.

Thank you!
